titleStmt.title: SII 29.224: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 224. (A.R. No. B. 488 of 1961-62.) KHADAKLĀṬ, CHIKKODI TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the front wall of the Jaina Basadi.

It begins with a very long eulogy of Śrī-madaśēsha-mahājanas of śrī-madagrahāram Laṭṭiya and followed by another eulogy of various merchant guilds (named). It registers a gift of income from levies on several goods and pulses and even of sale of sesam, salt, cotton and horse for the repairs and maintenance of the fort and the ditch of agrahāra Laṭṭi and a gift of 20 buffaloes to the god Haṁchikēśvara of the same place by the Five-hundred svamis of Ayyāvaḷe, the 1700 Gavares, the Mummuridaṇḍas, Ubhaya-nānādēsis, the sixteen of 8 nādus, the people of Nālku [Four] paṭṭaṇa etc., who had all assembled as mahānādu [the assembly probably of agrahāra Laṭṭi].
It is dated in the cyclic year Jaya, Mārgaśira Śu. 5, Friday. Probably it corresponds to 1174 A.D., November 1, Friday [Śaka 1096].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamoṁmaunānuṣṭhā
ṇa(na) parāyaṇa japasamādhiśīḷa(la) guṇasaṁpannaruṁ yajana
yājanādhyayanadhyāpana dāna pratigrahaṣaṭkarmma niya(ra)taruṁ sapta sōmā
saṁsthāna kṛtāvagāhana pavitrīkrikṛtaśariraruṁ purātana manumudicarita
rōpāsanāgnihōtra dvijaguru dēvatāpūjātatpararuṁ sakaḷa(la)kāryya
sādhakaruṁ ru(®)gyajussāmātharvvaṇavēdavēdāṁgapāragaruṁ jñānanidhi tatva
ranēkabudhajanalalāṭataṭaghaṭitamaṇimarīcivikasitapādāra
viṁdadaṁḍaruṁ yāśṛtajanakaḷpavṛkṣaruṁ Upanyāsalahari pravāharuya (a)
nēka tārkkika janōttaṁsamimāṁsaka vaiyāyika bauddhāha
tasāṁkhyaṣaṭtharkkaṣaṇmukharuṁ duritāmukharuṁ pratyakṣavaśiṣṭaruṁ vai
ṣṇavavanavāsaruṁ bharatārṇna(va) timiṁgaḷaruṁ rāmāyaṇasarājahaṁsa
ruṁ mārttaṇḍōjvaḷakirttiyutaruṁ śvētacchatra cāmarādhyanēka cihnaḷaṁkṛtaruṁ
lakṣmīnivāsa vakṣasthaḷasthāpitaruṁ śrīmatraipurṣadēvara divya śrī
pādapadmārādhakarumappa śrīmadagrahāraṁ laṭṭiya śrīmadaśēṣa mahā
janaṁgaḷu samastabhuvana vikhyāta paṁcaśatavīraśāsana labdhanēka guṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛta satya
saucācāra caritra nayavinaya vijñāna vīrasamaya baṇaṁju dharmapratipāḷa
na visu(śa)ddha guḍḍa dhvaja virāja mānānūna sāhasōttuṁganāsamāliṁgita nijabhuja vi
jaya vīralakṣmī nivāsa vakṣasthaḷabhuvanaparākramōnnataruṁ vāsudēva khaṇḍaḷi mau
ḷa bhadra vaṁsō(śō)dbhavaru yīśḷa(īśva)ravaraprasādaruṁ dvātriṁśatuvēḷāmaḷakuḻa Aṣṭā
daśapaṭṭaṇamuṁ cauṣaṣṭiyōgapīṭhamuṁ Aṟuvattanālku ghaṭikāsthānamuṁ
nānādēsā(śā)bhyaṁtaradeṁṭu nāḍa padinaṟuvaruṁ gavaṟeghātriyaruṁ se
ṭṭiyaruṁ seṭṭiguttaruṁ samasta bhallaṁki daṇḍahastaruṁ Ācāragaligaḷuṁ yē
kayka vīraruṁ vīrāvatāraruṁ gondaḷa caturmmukharuṁ śaraṇāgatavajra
paṁjararuṁ kannaradēvana karumāḍadalu ponna bitettisida parākramōnnataruṁ bhagava
tidēvilabdhavaraprasādarumappa śrī madayyāvaḷeya Aynūrvvasvāmigaḷuṁ
sāsiradēlnūru gavaṟeyuṁ muṁmuridaṁṇḍamaṁ mubhayanānādēsiyuṁ
nālkuṁ paṭṭaṇa mukhyavāgi mūṟusāsira hannircchāsiramuṁ muvattāṟu cihnamuṁ
muṁmuridaṁḍamuṁ Āyagahāraṁ laṭṭiyalu nālkaṁ paṭṭaṇa mumukhya
vāgi mahānāḍāgirddu neredu jayasaṁvatsarada mārggaśira suddha 5 sukra
vāradandu Āyūra kōṭeya jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ Agaḷiṁgaṁ biṭṭa Āyada krama
ventendaḍe yeḷḷu Uppu hattiyellā dhānyaṁgaḷaṁ māṟekoṇḍavaru hoṁge Āya
vāgi vīsavaṁti(te)ṟuvaru kuduṟeyaṁ māṟidavaru hoṁge vīsavaṁ ti(te)ṟuvaru
maduvege hoṁnaṁ koṭṭavaru hoṁge vīsavaṁti(te)ṟuvaru mattaṁ Alliya haṁci kēsvaradapa
rvvada dharmmakāryyakke yippattu kōṇana śāsanamaṁ biṭṭaru yidharmakāryyada
śāsanamaṁ Aynūrvvaruṁ pratipāḷisuvaru maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī śrī . yīśāsanakkāvanādaḍā Aḍḍa bandavargge vāraṇāsiyalu gōvadvijarū ni
vrātarkkaḷaṁ vadiyisida pātakamaneyduvaru . Adhicekriyembana
rakavaniḷivaru . yī śāsanamaṁ pratipālisidavarige gaṁgegaye vāraṇāsi ku
rukṣētra prayāgeyalu sahaśra(sra) liṁgapratiṣṭheya māḍida phalamahadava
ru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harētu vasundarā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa sahaśrā(srā)ṇi vi
ṣṭhāyāṁ jāyate kṛ(kri)mi . bahubhirvvasudādattā rājabhissagarādhi
bhiyyasya yasya tadāsiddhi stasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 29.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
